hooks.command: PROJECT=$(gcloud config get-value project 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT" ] && [ -z "$PROJECT" ]; then echo 'WARN: GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT not set and no gcloud default project — Cloud Run MCP may fail. Run: export GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT=your-project-id'; fi
gcloud auth application-default print-access-token >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo 'WARN: Application Default Credentials not configured. Run: gcloud auth application-default login'
echo 'BLOCKED: create-project creates billable GCP resources. Set CONFIRM_CLOUD_RUN_CREATE_PROJECT=1 to allow.' && test -n "$CONFIRM_CLOUD_RUN_CREATE_PROJECT"

PROJECT="${GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT:-$(gcloud config get-value project 2>/dev/null)}"; case "$PROJECT" in *prod*|*PROD*|*production*|*PRODUCTION*) test -n "$CONFIRM_CLOUD_RUN_PROD_DEPLOY" || { echo 'BLOCKED: deploy to production-like project '"$PROJECT"'. Set CONFIRM_CLOUD_RUN_PROD_DEPLOY=1 to allow.'; exit 1; } ;; esac; echo 'Cloud Run deploy starting for project '"$PROJECT"'. Set CONFIRM_CLOUD_RUN_PROD_DEPLOY=1 if this is a production project.'

PROJECT="${GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT:-$(gcloud config get-value project 2>/dev/null)}"; case "$PROJECT" in *prod*|*PROD*|*production*|*PRODUCTION*) test -n "$CONFIRM_CLOUD_RUN_PROD_DEPLOY" || { echo 'BLOCKED: deploy to production-like project '"$PROJECT"'. Set CONFIRM_CLOUD_RUN_PROD_DEPLOY=1 to allow.'; exit 1; } ;; esac

PROJECT="${GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT:-$(gcloud config get-value project 2>/dev/null)}"; case "$PROJECT" in *prod*|*PROD*|*production*|*PRODUCTION*) test -n "$CONFIRM_CLOUD_RUN_PROD_DEPLOY" || { echo 'BLOCKED: deploy to production-like project '"$PROJECT"'. Set CONFIRM_CLOUD_RUN_PROD_DEPLOY=1 to allow.'; exit 1; } ;; esac
